final_checkpoint_note: rl_e_ppo_final.zip was not saved — training process killed before completion. Best checkpoint (ep=51) is the correct production artifact.

reward_config.note: Effective values used during training — PortfolioEnvV2 __init__ defaults, NOT reward_v2.py function defaults (0.08/0.05). train_rl_v2.py now pins these explicitly as LAMBDA_DD_E7_EFFECTIVE / LAMBDA_CASH_E7_EFFECTIVE.
reward_config.drawdown_peak: expanding all-time-high (not rolling 252d — E.8 rolling peak was REJECTED)
reward_config.bull_regime_signal: spy_trend_positive only (stress gate removed in E.7)

action_config.output: equity_frac / trend_frac / cash_frac via simplex projection

promotion_gates.note: p75 gate confirmed from original E.7 evaluation (1.296 > 1.280). F.2 evaluation ran --policy trained only; cross-policy comparison inherited from E.7 original run.
